name: Mrs Fields Apple Cobbler Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Tart Apples; peel and chop
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and cinnamon. Mix well and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, mix sugars with butter using an electric mixer on medium speed. Scrape down the sides of the bowl.
4. Add eggs and vanilla, blending until smooth. Thoroughly incorporate apple juice and apple butter.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture, chopped apples, raisins, and pecans; blend at low speed until just combined.
6. To prepare crumb coating, combine sugar, oats, and cinnamon in a medium bowl. Mix well, then add melted butter and mix until dry ingredients are well moistened. Set aside.
7. Roll dough into 1-inch-diameter balls. Roll each ball in crumb mixture until well coated.
8. Place cookies on ungreased cookie sheets, about 2 inches apart.
9. Bake for 24-26 minutes, or until firm to the touch and crumb mixture begins to brown. Transfer to a cool, flat surface.
